description:
Providing Pre-constructional anti- termite treatment and creating a chemical barrier to the building by injecting chemical emulsion of required concentrations under grade slab and Grade beam,  around the Plinth, Plinth filling, trenches, junction of wall and floor, Retaining / side walls of basement floor, external perimeter of building, surrounding of pipes, expansion joints, below UG sump and etc.as per instructions of chemical manufacturer and all as directed.  The treatment shall be carried out strictly in accordance with the technical specification and conforming to IS 6313  or equivalent BS  specification.  The chemical to be used as insecticides for the treatment shall be 50% EC (Imidacloprid 30.5 SC)and the application shall be dilute one part of chemical  50% EC with 49 parts of water to get 1% emulsion and strictly in accordance with the manufacturer's specification.
Note : Measurement taken along external periphery of the building. Treatment shall extend to a width of 1m around the building. (Including 10 years warranty).

description:
Single component pure polyurethane based  elastomeric seamless liquid applied membrane:
1.Before starting waterproofing  works the surface of  the slab should  be  made free of any loose particles, vegetation, grease or oily matters etc.treating all surface cracks, construction joints and honey combs by grouting with specialised nonshrink grout, injection grouting through nozzles, haunching the corners,bore packing and grouting the annular space between pipe and concrete as specified by approved Contractor and preparation of surface in all aspects to receive the waterproofing  Ponding test should be conducted for a period of 72 hours to ensure that there is no leakage from the slab. Any damp spots on  the slab should  be  attended  by grouting  cement  mixed  with  flow  enhancers  like Cebex-100 or equivalent until the leak or dampness is arrested. 
2.After treating  the  surface as mentioned  above apply liquid applied,  high performance, pure polyurethane based, single component,  low VOC, elastomeric, seamless, moisture curing, waterproof membrane, applied in 2 coats with roller / airless spray,(As required  by the manufacturer specifications but minimum thickness (DFT) shall pass 1.5 mm) with  over 400% elongation and sufficient puncture resistance and anti-root penetration capacity over one coat of compatible primer at a coverage as per the manufacturer's recommendation . The spray applied membrane should be seamless, free of any holes. Overlap   should   be   as   per manufacturer specifications.
3. When spray applied or brush coated procedure is adopted, the coverage of the material should be noted on a daily basis and to be submitted to client. 
4.At the expansion joints and termination, the detailing for the membrane application shall be submitted to the Client / the Engineer/QA approval prior to commencing the work.
5.The PU waterproofing membrane should be extended 300mm above FFL on the vertical surface and tucked into the wall by making a groove.
6.Ponding tests for 72 hours should be conducted after the completion of application of membrane to ensure water tightness.
7.Treatment shall be provided from standard manufacturers like FOSROC,BASF,SIKA / Equivalent.
8.Thereafter Providing and laying 250 GSM non woven polypropylene geotextile for horizontal surface.

description:
1. Before starting waterproofing works the surface of the wall and floor should be made free of any loose particles, vegetation, grease, oily matters etc. All tie rod
holes  should  be  filled  properly.  All  honeycombs  should  be  repaired  as  per approved repair procedures. Any damp spots on the walls should be attended by
grouting with slurry cement mixed with flow enhancers like cebex 100 or equivalent until the leak or dampness is arrested.
2. All penetrations should be made water tight. Waterproofing details near the· penetrations should be submitted to the client and approval to be obtained prior to start the work. When pipes are fixed in the openings left out while casting structure, the  filling of the space between  pipe and concrete  shall  be carried out by approved non shrink cementitous grout. The portion of the pipe having interface with grout shall be roughened by spraying sand over epoxy bonding agent applied on the pipe and old concrete surface in contact with pipe.
3. Pond the pool by keeping water for full depth for atleast 72 hours. Any leakage or dampness  on the  surface  should  be arrested  by treating  the  concrete  by: injection of PU grout or any other suitable method acceptable to the client / the Engineer.
4. After  preparing  the tank as  mentioned above apply Single component, elastomeric liquid cold applied Poly Urethane membrane for floors (Thickness  as per manufacturer specification but shall not be less than 1.5mm thickness) with over 400% elongation and sufficient tensile  strength  (minimum  4MPa}. The  spray applied  membrane  should  be seamless,  free  of  any  holes. Applicator  should establish the continuity of the membrane with proper overlaps on the wall surfaces to a minimum of 300 mm from FFL with suitable test methods. 
5. After completion of waterproofing and allowing curing time, the ponding test shall be carried out to ensure water tightness for a period of 72 hours .
6.Thereafter Providing and laying 250 GSM non woven polypropylene geotextile for horizontal surface.
7.Treatment shall be provided from standard manufacturers like BASF, SIKA, FOSROC or equivalent.

description:
Providing Pre-constructional anti- termite treatment and creating a chemical barrier to the building by injecting chemical emulsion of required concentrations under grade slab and Grade beam,  around the Plinth, Plinth filling, trenches, junction of wall and floor, Retaining / side walls of basement floor, external perimeter of building, surrounding of pipes, expansion joints, below UG sump and etc.as per instructions of chemical manufacturer and all as directed.  The treatment shall be carried out strictly in accordance with the technical specification and conforming to IS 6313  or equivalent BS  specification.  The chemical to be used as insecticides for the treatment shall be 50% EC (Imidacloprid 30.5 SC)and the application shall be dilute one part of chemical  50% EC with 49 parts of water to get 1% emulsion and strictly in accordance with the manufacturer's specification.

description:
Single component pure polyurethane based  elastomeric seamless liquid applied membrane:
1.Before starting waterproofing  works the surface of  the slab should  be  made free of any loose particles, vegetation, grease or oily matters etc.treating all surface cracks, construction joints and honey combs by grouting with specialised nonshrink grout, injection grouting through nozzles, haunching the corners,bore packing and grouting the annular space between pipe and concrete as specified by approved vendor and preparation of surface in all aspects to receive the waterproofing  Ponding test should be conducted for a period of 72 hours to ensure that there is no leakage from the slab.Any damp spots on  the slab should  be  attended  by grouting  cement  mixed  with  flow  enhancers  like Cebex-100 or equivalent until the leak or dampness is arrested. 
2.After treating  the  surface as mentioned  above apply liquid applied,  high performance, pure polyurethane based, single component,  low VOC, elastomeric, seamless, moisture curing, waterproof membrane, applied in 2 coats with roller / airless spray,(As required  by the manufacturer specifications but minimum thickness (DFT) shall pass 1.5 mm) with  over 400% elongation and sufficient puncture resistance and anti-root penetration capacity over one coat of compatible primer at a coverage as per the manufacturer's recommendation . The spray applied membrane should be seamless, free of any holes. Overlap   should   be   as   per manufacturer specifications.
3. When spray applied or brush coated procedure is adopted, the coverage of the material should be noted on a daily basis and to be submitted to client. 
4.At the expansion joints and termination, the detailing for the membrane application shall be submitted to the PIC/QA approval prior to commencing the work.
5.The PU waterproofing membrane should be extended 300mm above FFL on the vertical surface and tucked into the wall by making a groove.
6.Ponding tests for 72 hours should be conducted after the completion of application of membrane to ensure water tightness.
7.Treatment shall be provided from standard manufacturers like FOSROC,BASF,SIKA / Equivalent.
8.Thereafter Providing and laying 250 GSM non woven polypropylene geotextile for horizontal surface.
9.Sand sprinkle to be given for vertical wall surface over the PU waterproof coating to make proper mechanical key for bonding the plaster surface using special bonding agents .
Note: Plan area shall be the mode of measurement.

description:
1. Before starting waterproofing works the surface of the wall and floor should be made free of any loose particles, vegetation, grease, oily matters etc. All tie rod
holes  should  be  filled  properly.  All  honeycombs  should  be  repaired  as  per approved repair procedures. Any damp spots on the walls should be attended by
grouting with slurry cement mixed with flow enhancers like cebex 100 or equivalent until the leak or dampness is arrested.
2. All penetrations should be made water tight. Waterproofing details near the· penetrations should be submitted to the client and approval to be obtained prior to start the work. When pipes are fixed in the openings left out while casting structure, the  filling of the space between  pipe and concrete  shall  be
carried out by approved non shrink cementitous grout. The portion of the pipe having interface with grout shall be roughened by spraying sand over epoxy bonding agent applied on the pipe and old concrete surface in contact with pipe.
3. Pond the pool by keeping water for full depth for atleast 72 hours. Any leakage or dampness  on the  surface  should  be arrested  by treating  the  concrete  by: injection of PU grout or any other suitable method acceptable to the client.
4. After  preparing  the tank as  mentioned above apply Single component, elastomeric liquid cold applied Poly Urethane membrane for floors ( Thickness  as per manufacturer specification but shall not be less than 1.5mm thickness) with over 400% elongation and sufficient tensile  strength  (minimum  4MPa}  .The  spray applied  membrane  should  be seamless,  free  of  any  holes. Applicator  should establish the continuity of the membrane with proper overlaps on the wall surfaces to a minimum of 300 mm from FFL with suitable test methods. 
5. After completion of waterproofing and allowing curing time, the ponding test shall be carried out to ensure water tightness for a period of 72 hours .
6.Thereafter Providing and laying 250 GSM non woven polypropylene geotextile for horizontal surface.
7.Treatment shall be provided from standard manufacturers like BASF, SIKA, FOSROC or equivalent.

Providing Pre-constructional anti- termite treatment and creating a chemical barrier to the building by injecting chemical emulsion of required concentrations under grade slab and Grade beam,  around the Plinth, Plinth filling, trenches, junction of wall and floor, Retaining / side walls of basement floor, external perimeter of building, surrounding of pipes, expansion joints, below UG sump and etc.as per instructions of chemical manufacturer and all as directed.  The treatment shall be carried out strictly in accordance with the technical specification and conforming to IS 6313  or equivalent BS  specification.  The chemical to be used as insecticides for the treatment shall be 50% EC (Imidacloprid 30.5 SC) and the application shall be dilute one part of chemical 50% EC with 49 parts of water to get 1% emulsion and strictly in accordance with the manufacturer's specification.
Note : Measurement taken along external periphery of the building. Treatment shall extend to a width of 1m around the building. (Including 10 years warranty).

description:
1.Treating the Construction Joints : Chase opening the Construction Joints by providing "V" groove,  removing  the  dust  and  clean  the  designated  area following  by  providing  chemical  injection  treatment  in the  form  of  pressure grouting by injecting cement slurry admixed with approved grout admixture,  in the  required  consistency  through  the  pre fixed  PVC nozzles, which shall include drilling of 18 mm dia holes, fixing of PVC nozzles with approved chemical' and final cutting the projected nozzles and sealing off the PVC nozzles after the injection  operation  is  over  with  approved  chemical,  nonshrink  rapid  setting grout, finishing, curing etc. as per manufacturers  specification and as directed.Tierod holes shall be filled with approved grout materials.
 2. Coving: Providing and Applying at the junction of slab and vertical offsets with cement Mortar 1:4 and approved admixture at a size of 75 mm x 75 mm.
3. Bore Packing:  Preparing the inside surface of core and PVC by roughening using suitable file to get better adhesion prior to packing works. Cleaning the surface by wire brushing followed by water jet to remove any laitance or loose flaky  particles.
4. Providing necessary formwork for packing the bore using suitable arrangement (depending  upon  site  conditions).  Applying  a  coat  of  epoxy bonding agent to enhance adhesion between  the packing material and other surfaces. Packing the gap using approved  non-shrink cement polymer based grout. Ponding tests for a period of 48 hours should be conducted before start to ensure water tightness.

description:
Single component pure polyurethane based  elastomeric seamless liquid applied membrane:
1.Before starting waterproofing  works the surface of  the slab should  be  made free of any loose particles, vegetation, grease or oily matters etc.treating all surface cracks, construction joints and honey combs by grouting with specialised nonshrink grout, injection grouting through nozzles, haunching the corners,bore packing and grouting the annular space between pipe and concrete as specified by approved Contractor and preparation of surface in all aspects to receive the waterproofing  Ponding test should be conducted for a period of 72 hours to ensure that there is no leakage from the slab. Any damp spots on  the slab should  be  attended  by grouting  cement  mixed  with  flow  enhancers  like Cebex-100 or equivalent until the leak or dampness is arrested. 
2.After treating  the  surface as mentioned  above apply liquid applied,  high performance, pure polyurethane based, single component,  low VOC, elastomeric, seamless, moisture curing, waterproof membrane, applied in 2 coats with roller / airless spray,(As required  by the manufacturer specifications but minimum thickness (DFT) shall pass 1.5 mm) with  over 400% elongation and sufficient puncture resistance and anti-root penetration capacity over one coat of compatible primer at a coverage as per the manufacturer's recommendation . The spray applied membrane should be seamless, free of any holes. Overlap   should   be   as   per manufacturer specifications.
3. When spray applied or brush coated procedure is adopted, the coverage of the material should be noted on a daily basis and to be submitted to client. 
4.At the expansion joints and termination, the detailing for the membrane application shall be submitted to the Client / the Engineer/QA approval prior to commencing the work.
5.The PU waterproofing membrane should be extended 300mm above FFL on the vertical surface and tucked into the wall by making a groove.
6.Ponding tests for 72 hours should be conducted after the completion of application of membrane to ensure water tightness.
7.Treatment shall be provided from standard manufacturers like FOSROC,BASF,SIKA / Equivalent.
8.Thereafter Providing and laying 250 GSM non woven polypropylene geotextile for horizontal surface.

description:
1. Before starting waterproofing works the surface of the wall and floor should be made free of any loose particles, vegetation, grease, oily matters etc. All tie rod
holes  should  be  filled  properly.  All  honeycombs  should  be  repaired  as  per approved repair procedures. Any damp spots on the walls should be attended by
grouting with slurry cement mixed with flow enhancers like cebex 100 or equivalent until the leak or dampness is arrested.
2. All penetrations should be made water tight. Waterproofing details near the· penetrations should be submitted to the client and approval to be obtained prior to start the work. When pipes are fixed in the openings left out while casting structure, the  filling of the space between  pipe and concrete  shall  be carried out by approved non shrink cementitous grout. The portion of the pipe having interface with grout shall be roughened by spraying sand over epoxy bonding agent applied on the pipe and old concrete surface in contact with pipe.
3. Pond the pool by keeping water for full depth for atleast 72 hours. Any leakage or dampness  on the  surface  should  be arrested  by treating  the  concrete  by: injection of PU grout or any other suitable method acceptable to the client / the Engineer.
4. After  preparing  the tank as  mentioned above apply Single component, elastomeric liquid cold applied Poly Urethane membrane for floors (Thickness  as per manufacturer specification but shall not be less than 1.5mm thickness) with over 400% elongation and sufficient tensile  strength  (minimum  4MPa}. The  spray applied  membrane  should  be seamless,  free  of  any  holes. Applicator  should establish the continuity of the membrane with proper overlaps on the wall surfaces to a minimum of 300 mm from FFL with suitable test methods. 
5. After completion of waterproofing and allowing curing time, the ponding test shall be carried out to ensure water tightness for a period of 72 hours .
6.Thereafter Providing and laying 250 GSM non woven polypropylene geotextile for horizontal surface.
7.Treatment shall be provided from standard manufacturers like BASF, SIKA, FOSROC or equivalent.

description: Providing and fixing at parking floor to floor expansion joint Kantaflex model no. – XH4FS-4 for 100mm in accordance with the Structural drawing and specifications. The system is proprietary design consisting of aluminum profiles. The expansion joint includes aluminum frames and centre plate which slides between the frames to allow the movement joints. The system shall withstand continuous pedestrian, vehicular traffic and maintain water tightness. The system should accommodate seismic movement without damage to the components. Aluminum to conform as per ASTM B221 for extrusion alloy 6063-T5/T6 and contain moisture barrier for maintaining water tightness. Cost to include drilling and fixing of extrusions using heavy duty anchor bolts, and sealing the joints capable of withstanding repeated extensions, compressions, vibrations and cyclic movement without lot of adhesion and resist deterioration by weathering, sunlight, ozone, water, salt water, oil, fuels, acids and most of the commonly used acids, etc., complete within 50% movement capacity.

description:
Providing Pre-constructional anti- termite treatment and creating a chemical barrier to the building by injecting chemical emulsion of required concentrations under grade slab and Grade beam, around the footings, trenches, junction of wall and floor, Retaining / side walls of basement floor, external perimeter of building, surrounding of pipes, expansion joints, below UG sump and etc.as per instructions of chemical manufacturer and all as directed.  The treatment shall be carried out strictly in accordance with the technical specification and conforming to IS 6313  or equivalent BS  specification.  The chemical to be used as insecticides for the treatment shall be 50% EC (Imidacloprid 30.5 SC)and the application shall be dilute one part of chemical  50% EC with 49 parts of water to get 1% emulsion and strictly in accordance with the manufacturer's specification.

Treatment shall extend to a width of 1m around the building. (Including 10years warranty)

description:
1. Before starting waterproofing works the surface of the slab should be made free of any loose particles, vegetation, grease or oily matters etc. All honeycombs should be repaired as per approved repair procedures. Any damp spots on the slab should be attended by grouting cement mixed with flow enhancers like Cebex-100 or equivalent until the leak or dampness is arrested. Ponding test should be conducted to ensure that there is no leakage from the slab.
2. After preparing the surface as mentioned above apply acrylic cementitious coating (preferable two coats) with minimum 1.2mm thickness. The membrane should have minimum 40% elongation capacity with a water resistance capacity of 1.5 bars.
3. Coverage of the material should be noted on a daily basis and to be included in the daily quality control report.
4. All penetrations should be made water tight. Waterproofing details near the penetrations should be submitted to the client and approval to be obtained prior to start the work.

description:
Providing Pre-constructional anti- termite treatment and creating a chemical barrier to the building by injecting chemical emulsion of required concentrations under grade slab and Grade beam, around the footings, trenches, junction of wall and floor, Retaining / side walls of basement floor, external perimeter of building, surrounding of pipes, expansion joints, below UG sump and etc.as per instructions of chemical manufacturer and all as directed.  The treatment shall be carried out strictly in accordance with the technical specification and conforming to IS 6313  or equivalent BS  specification.  The chemical to be used as insecticides for the treatment shall be 50% EC (Imidacloprid 30.5 SC)and the application shall be dilute one part of chemical  50% EC with 49 parts of water to get 1% emulsion and strictly in accordance with the manufacturer's specification.

description:
1. Before starting waterproofing works the surface of the slab should be made free of any loose particles, vegetation, grease or oily matters etc. All honeycombs should be repaired as per approved repair procedures. Any damp spots on the slab should be attended by grouting cement mixed with flow enhancers like Cebex-100 or equivalent until the leak or dampness is arrested. Ponding test should be conducted to ensure that there is no leakage from the slab.
2. After treating the surface as mentioned above apply PU waterproofing coat (2mm thickness or as required by the manufacturer specifications) with 300% - 600% elongation and sufficient puncture resistance and anti-root penetration capacity. Results of tests conducted as per DIN 4062 for anti-root penetration and ASTM E 154 for puncture resistance should be submitted to the client for approval. The spray applied membrane should be seamless, free of any holes. Applicator should establish the continuity of the membrane with suitable test methods. The pre fab membranes should be joined as per manufacturer specifications and it should be water tight. Overlap should be as per manufacturer specifications.
3. When spray applied or brush coated procedure is adopted, the coverage of the material should be noted on a daily basis and to be included in the daily quality control report.
4. Ponding tests should be conducted after the completion of application/laying of membrane to ensure water tightness.
5. All penetrations should be made water tight. Waterproofing details near the penetrations should be submitted to the client and approval to be obtained prior to start the work.
6. Membrane details at the expansion joints and termination should be submitted to the client and approval to be obtained prior to start the work.
7. During construction all the construction joints should be provided with butyl rubber swellable bars from standard manufacturers like BASF, SIKA, FOSROC or equivalent.

description:
1. Before starting waterproofing works the surface of the slab should be made free of any loose particles, vegetation, grease or oily matters etc. All honeycombs should be repaired as per approved repair procedures. Any damp spots on the slab should be attended by grouting cement mixed with flow enhancers like Cebex-100 or equivalent until the leak or dampness is arrested. Ponding test should be conducted to ensure that there is no leakage from the slab.
2. After preparing the surface as mentioned above apply acrylic cementitious coating (preferable two coats) with minimum 1.2mm thickness. The membrane should have minimum 40% elongation capacity with a water resistance capacity of 1.5 bars.
3. Coverage of the material should be noted on a daily basis and to be included in the daily quality control report.
4. All penetrations should be made water tight. Waterproofing details near the penetrations should be submitted to the client and approval to be obtained prior to start the work.
5. When PVC pipes are inserted in the designated openings in the slab, it should be applied with epoxy bonding agent sprayed with sand on the portion coming in contact with non shrink grout or mortar or concrete to enhance the bonding.
6.During construction CJs are not to be provided in sunken areas for toilets, balconies and utility areas. By any chance if CJs exist in areas mentioned above, treatment method for such CJs should be considered on a case to case basis.
7. During construction of terrace slab all the construction joints should be provided with butyl rubber swellable bars from standard manufacturers like BASF, SIKA, FOSROC or equivalent.
8. Manufacturer/applicator should submit the complete product details with Shore A hardness, tensile strength, elongation and tear strength along with detailed method statement showing details at penetration, termination etc. Treatment shall be provided from standard manufacturers like BASF, SIKA, FOSROC or equivalent.

Lacquered glass must be made industrially (via curtain coating process); opaque (if viewed against a support wall), coated with PU lacquer (50 micron thick); color consistency (measured by Minolta spectrophotometer CM5081); highly durable (passes PERSOZ hardness test for minimum 220 oscillatios); humid resistant (conforms to BS EN 1036 1999); environmentally friendly (no lead, no arsenic, no copper, no formaldehyde); appropriate recycled content (12% post industrial / 6% post consumer); compressive strenght (1000 MPa) & tensile strenght (40 MPa),same as float glass.  Silicone used should not react with lacquer coating (compatible, alkoxy nuetral core), low VOC content <100g/l, low sag, curing time 36 hrs, medium to high modulus & should be used as per Saint-Gobain application guidelines. description: Suppiy abd fixing of M19 Stud Bolts, These shear connectors are embossment in deck sheet as typical pattern unique to each profile. To ensure friction at the embossment , there should not be any paint or grease on the sheet surface in contact with concrete nor should any  vibrating load be permitted yo act on the  slab until the has set completely.  The length after weld should extend at least 35mm above  thetop of the main rib of the deck profile. The distance from the deck rib shall be minimum  25mm.  Single connector to be located at the center of the beam except at butt jionta where connector to be staggered. To avoide damaging to decking , connector to be located along the predetermined lines marked on it. Minimum spacing of cannectors shall be 5 times  the diameter of shank and maximum  shall not more than  600 or 4 times the depth of slab. Connectors in pair  to have a minimum gap  of 4 times the diameter of shank, as shown in drg & as directed  by consultant /EIC.

description:
Fire rated Intumescent/vermiculite paint( 2 Hrs Fire painting)
Supplying and applying light weight vermiculite gypsum/portland  cement based wet mix  spray to structural steel elements to get fire protected  up to 120 minutes , by certified applicator. Applied thickness to suit structural steel size and relevant Hp/A calculation. Subrate must be clean , dry and free from dust, or any other condition preventing good adhesion. Subrate shall be treated with adhesive key coat / primer  prior to spray application as required. The vermiculate spray material  used shall  pass all the the necessary testing criteria required foe fire rating as per the IBC/NBC/BS/AS/DIN/ASTM/  etc and shall be applied with necessary priming of the surface to get the attractive, monolithic, trovelled finish which  is durable and economical. The treated surface shall be with amonolithic spary with hydraulic set and trovelled finish  with no cracks or delamination's, no erosion,  no spalling etc and des not promote corrosion of steel . Rate to include  for scaffolding & all as directed by  consultant/EIC.

ef_source: ICE V4.1 — Steel, Rebar (Virgin)
